fields.description: If enabled, Payroll Vouchers with Run Type Special are included when summing the annual base.
fields.label: Include Special Run Vouchers in 13th Month Base

fields.description: Payroll Item fields to sum for the annual base (before dividing by 12). If empty, Basic Pay only is used.
fields.label: Included Income Components

fields.description: When enabled, Regular/Special payroll runs compute Tax and Taxable Income from Annual Tax Table (unless Method is Manual Only).
fields.label: Enable Income Tax Withholding

fields.description: Annual_Table_Per_Cycle: tax from annual table on this period’s taxable only. Annualized_YTD: projected annual income from YTD, prorated tax due minus tax already withheld. Manual_Only: do not overwrite Tax fields.
fields.label: Withholding Method

fields.description: Subtract employee SSS, WISP, PhilHealth, and HDMF shares from the tax base before bracket lookup.
fields.label: Deduct Contributions from Tax Base

fields.description: How to count “months elapsed” for (YTD taxable / n) × 12: calendar months from Jan (or from joining) to payroll Date To, or number of pay slips in the year including this one.
fields.label: Annualized Month Basis

fields.description: Start the month count from the calendar month of Date of Joining when it falls in the payroll year (otherwise from January).
fields.label: Annualized: From Date of Joining

fields.description: Voucher totals (and net_sales per day if selected) summed for taxable income. If empty, basic pay, overtime, holiday pay, and incentive are used.
fields.label: Tax Base Income Components

fields.description: Round worked hours to nearest N minutes after computing gross duration (0 = off).
fields.label: Time Rounding (Minutes)

fields.description: If employee clocked in (hours > 0) but worked less than this, pay at least this many hours (0 = off).
fields.label: Minimum Paid Hours If Clocked In

fields.description: Used when Overtime document has no rate and Overtime Type rate is missing.
fields.label: Default OT Pay Multiplier

fields.description: Deduct unpaid break minutes per day when worked hours meet threshold below.
fields.label: Unpaid Break (Minutes/Day)

fields.description: Apply unpaid break only when gross hours for the day are at least this (0 = always if break > 0).
fields.label: Apply Break After Hours
Apply Rest Day Premium on Sunday

fields.description: Added to basic pay like holiday rate when Sunday and no Payroll Holiday applies.
fields.label: Rest Day Rate (Premium)

fields.description: Extra pay per hour of night time as fraction of hourly rate (0.1 = 10%).
fields.label: Night Differential (Per Night Hour)

fields.description: Calendar month (1-12) when annual grant is posted by scheduler.
fields.label: Accrual Grant Month
